# glama-status-mcp

Daily-refreshed Glama score tracker for the sandraschi fleet. Scrapes per-tool TDQS grades from glama.ai, stores in SQLite with snapshot history, surfaces via MCP tools and a Vite/React web dashboard.

## Tools

- `glama_status`  -  Portmanteau: list (all repos), get (one repo, per-tool breakdown), worst_tools (lowest scoring tools), refresh (rescrape all + snapshot), history (refresh log), staleness (>7d stale), report (full daily report), deltas (score changes).
- `glama_scores_summary`  -  Compact fleet-wide score summary with grade distribution.
- `glama_daily_report`  -  Full markdown daily report: grade table, score deltas, worst tools, stale repos.

## Ports

- Backend: 11072
- Frontend: 11073

## Links

- Fleet dashboard: http://127.0.0.1:11073
- Glama profile: https://glama.ai/mcp/servers?query=author%3Asandraschi
